problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
hypothesis: If Neuromorphic spike-timing dependent plasticity is applied to without, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
